query: SELECT pp.id, pp.projectId, pp.stage, pp.category, pp.subcategory, pp.photoUrl, pp.description, p.name as project_name, p.id as proj_id FROM projectPhotos pp LEFT JOIN projects p ON pp.projectId = p.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT pp.id, pp.projectId, pp.stage, pp.category, pp.subcategory, pp.photoUrl, pp.description, p.name as project_name, p.id as proj_id FROM projectPhotos pp LEFT JOIN projects p ON pp.projectId = p.id;
